title: lippia diversifolia
intro: Lippia diversifolia, also known as Mexican marigold or Mexican mint, is a perennial shrub native to Central America and parts of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lippia diversifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
